title: Items But They're Animated
description:
Ever wanted your items animated well now you can

With this you can have some sick animations on your weapons and more!

So enjoy :D
body:
This mod pack adds animations to your items!



This adds animations to the
-----------------------------
Amethyst shard axolotl bucket
blaze rod breeze rod campfire
cod bucket water bucket 
lava bucket - diamond
diamond sword emerald
end crystal ender eye
fire charge glow berry
glow ink sac glowstone dust
gold ingot golden apple 
golden carrot golden sword
iron ingot iron sword lantern
netherite ingot netherite sword
ominous bottle ominous trial key
slime ball soul campfire campfire
soul torch - torch tadpole bucket
totem of undying trial key water bucket
